title: Responsive Pricing Table

statement.markdown:
# Responsive Pricing Table Challenge

Create a responsive pricing table using HTML and CSS with Tailwind CSS classes. The table should have a clean and modern design.
requirements
1. The pricing table should have a minimum of 3 plans (Free, Premium, Enterprise)
2. Each plan should have a unique heading, features, and price
3. The table should be responsive and look good on both desktop and mobile devices
4. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling

constraints: Table should be contained within a div with class 'max-w-5xl mx-auto pb-12'
Table rows and columns should use Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling
Use CSS flexbox or grid for responsive layout
Avoid using custom CSS whenever possible and rely on Tailwind CSS classes

starterCode.html:
Free Premium Enterprise
Features - Unlimited Storage - Unlimited Storage, Priority Support - Unlimited Storage, Priority Support, Custom Onboarding
Price $0/mo $19.99/mo $49.99/mo

gradingCriteria.description: Does the pricing table have a clean and modern design?
Does the pricing table look good on both desktop and mobile devices?
Does the pricing table have the required features (unlimited storage, priority support, custom onboarding)?
Is Tailwind CSS used for styling?
